articles.title: Cardano Primed For Explosive Rally Thanks To Upcoming Feature Giving Users Direct Access To Ethereum Dapps From ADA Wallets
articles.description: Cardano is on its way to becoming a top chain compatible with the Ethereum Virtual Machine after the impending introduction of a new feature that will allow users to seamlessly use an EVM contract directly from any ADA wallet.

articles.title: Crypto Market March Roundup: Bitcoin Rises Amid Banking Uncertainties, Macro Headwinds
articles.description: Mask Network’s MASK token surged over 68%, becoming the top-performing token for the month. XRP rose 41%.

articles.title: Legal Expert John Deaton Hints At Huge XRP Upside As Market Anticipates Ripple’s Win In SEC Case
articles.description: Predictions on what the future holds for Ripple in the long term have been making rounds within the Ripple community while XRP supporters await a ruling from the Judge.

articles.title: dcSpark CTO: ‘Cardano Will Be a Top EVM Chain Next Month’
articles.description: Cardano users are soon expected to be able to access Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) contracts straight from their Cardano (ADA) wallets, increasing the network’s value for users and developers. An Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) is a runtime environment for executing smart contracts on the Ethereum blockchain. It functions as a decentralized virtual computer that developers […]

articles.title: Cardano Blockchain Seeks to Become Largest EVM Chain with This Innovation
articles.description: Coinspeaker Cardano Blockchain Seeks to Become Largest EVM Chain with This Innovation Milkomeda is working on a new feature that would allow Cardano users to use any EVM contract directly from any Cardano wallet. Cardano Blockchain Seeks to Become Largest EVM Chain with This Innovation

articles.title: Cardano Creator Dunks on Anti-Crypto Elizabeth Warren with Michael Jordan Reference
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson reacts to senator Elizabeth Warren's anti-crypto campaign using reference to greatest basketball player of all time

articles.title: Cardano Users Can Soon Access Ethereum Dapps Directly From ADA Wallets
articles.description: The move will be enabled after an upcoming feature on Milkomeda, an Ethereum Virtual Machine network, goes live.
